$comment: Default user settings schema. This file IS committed and documents every persisted preference + its default. The LIVE copy lives at <stateDir>/user-settings.json (outside the repo) and is never committed. The broker deep-merges the live file over these defaults on load, so adding a new key here makes it available to every existing install without a migration. Bump `version` only for a breaking re-shape.

engine.$comment: Last-used engine preferences, re-applied on startup so a restart keeps your choices.

workspace.$comment: Tabs + which one was focused, so the workspace is restored exactly as you left it. Tabs are session/file references; sessions themselves persist separately.

manage.$comment: Manage-screen UI state. tabOrder is a most-recently-used ordering of the manager pane ids (the search chip is always rendered first, before this list).

ui.$comment: Cosmetic/behaviour toggles for the web UI.
